title: sphenostigma caelestinum
intro: Sphenostigma caelestinum, also known as the elephant yam, is a type of plant native to West Africa, characterized by its large, edible tuberous roots. The medicinal properties of Sphenostigma caelestinum are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and protect against cell damage. Sphenostigma caelestinum is typically prepared as a decoction, which can be made by boiling the roots in water, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections.
